up.compound: O2 (oxidation of methane, methane-grown resting cells)

growth_records.cite: Gwak et al. Sulfur and methane oxidation by a single microorganism. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (2022). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2114799119. [PMC9371685]
growth_records.notes: Maximum specific growth rate (mu_max) on methane directly reported for strain HY1, batch culture, LSM medium, 25C, 200 rpm (growth calculated from slope of log10 OD600 vs time, per Methods). doubling_time_h = ln2/0.022 = 31.5 h. Oxygen uptake rate for methane-grown cells oxidizing methane taken from Table 2 (substrate-specific O2 consumption assay on resting cells at OD600=0.3, 500 uM methane), reported as-is; note this is a resting-cell assay, not necessarily identical to the growth-phase uptake rate, and units are per mg protein, not per gDW. [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]

up.compound: O2 (oxidation of thiosulfate, thiosulfate-grown resting cells)

growth_records.cite: Gwak et al. Sulfur and methane oxidation by a single microorganism. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (2022). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2114799119. [PMC9371685]
growth_records.notes: Maximum specific growth rate (mu_max) on thiosulfate directly reported for strain HY1, batch culture, LSM medium, 25C, 200 rpm, chemolithoautotrophic growth (CBB cycle for CO2 fixation). doubling_time_h = ln2/0.033 = 21.0 h. Oxygen uptake rate for thiosulfate-grown cells oxidizing thiosulfate from Table 2 (resting-cell assay, 4 mM thiosulfate, OD600=0.3); units per mg protein, not gDW. [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]

growth_records.cite: Gwak et al. Sulfur and methane oxidation by a single microorganism. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (2022). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2114799119. [PMC9371685]
growth_records.snippet: the mixotrophic growth rate (μmax = 0.023 ± 0.001 h−1) ... was also lower than the growth rate on thiosulfate (μmax = 0.033 ± 0.004 h−1), although similar to the growth rate on methane (μmax = 0.022 ± 0.006 h−1)
growth_records.notes: Maximum specific growth rate (mu_max) reported for strain HY1 grown mixotrophically on methane + thiosulfate simultaneously, batch culture, LSM medium, 25C. doubling_time_h = ln2/0.023 = 30.1 h. [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]
